quote: As long as a human being worries about when he will die, and what he has that is his, all of his works are zero. – Kabir
fact: A palindrome is a sentence or group of sentences that reads the same backwards as it does forward: Ex:  `Red rum, sir, is murder.` `Ma is as selfless as I am.` `Nurse, I spy gypsies. Run!`  `A man, a plan, a canal - Panama.` `He lived as a devil, eh?`
joke: Why are fish easy to weigh? Because they have their own scales.
